message:
fix(obsidian): use capability IDs instead of operation IDs in related fields

The `related` field in OperationInfo.ai_hints is typed Vec<CapabilityId>
but was populated with operation IDs (OP_*) instead of capability IDs
(CAP_*). Fixed 7 instances:

- OP_NOTES_GET → CAP_READ (notes.list, backlinks.get)
- OP_NOTES_LIST → CAP_READ (notes.get)
- OP_NOTES_UPDATE → CAP_WRITE (notes.create)
- OP_NOTES_CREATE → CAP_WRITE (notes.update)
- OP_TAGS_LIST → CAP_READ (search)
- OP_SEARCH → CAP_READ (tags.list)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
